problem id: 3bdb85cf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10101110 -> 01110101
  10000011 -> 00011100
  10110100 -> 10100101
  00011101 -> 10101000
  11001100 -> 01100110
  11101101 -> 00101111
  00100010 -> 00010001
  10010110 -> 00110100
  11011110 -> 01110110

query: 10001000
predicted answer: 01000100
